series_metadata.series_title: Cash Food Policy Outreach Technical Assistance
series_metadata.series_description: The rules contained reflect chapters 1000 - 4000 of the Ohio Administrative Code. The documents also contain information regarding the clearance comments and process for the rules during the five-year rule review process. Including but not limited to Temporary Assistance Needy Family (TANF), United State Department Agriculture (USDA), Ohio Workforce (OWF), Kinship Caregiver which are services applied to a family dynamic.
